languages.original_text: "Language is the livery of meaning, and this livery directly reflects the architecture of the speaker's mind. By comprehending your language, I also comprehend your thinking, bringing me one iota closer to comprehending you as a concept."

languages.text: "Любой язык есть форма, в которую облечен смысл, и эта форма напрямую отражает строение разума носителя. Постигая ваш язык, я постигаю и ваше мышление, становясь еще на йоту ближе к постижению вас как концепции".

"Language is the livery of meaning, and this livery directly reflects the architecture of the speaker's mind. By comprehending your language, I also comprehend your thinking, bringing me one iota closer to comprehending you as a concept."

"Language is the livery of meaning, and this livery directly reflects the architecture of the speaker's mind. By comprehending your language, I also comprehend your thinking, bringing me one iota closer to comprehending you as a concept."

languages.text: «El idioma es el uniforme del significado, y dicho uniforme refleja directamente la arquitectura de la mente del hablante. Al comprender vuestro idioma, puedo entender también vuestra forma de pensar, lo que acerca un paso más a comprenderos como concepto».
languages.original_text: "Language is the livery of meaning, and this livery directly reflects the architecture of the speaker's mind. By comprehending your language, I also comprehend your thinking, bringing me one iota closer to comprehending you as a concept."

traits.locale_text: «El idioma es el uniforme del significado, y dicho uniforme refleja directamente la arquitectura de la mente del hablante. Al comprender vuestro idioma, puedo entender también vuestra forma de pensar, lo que acerca un paso más a comprenderos como concepto».

languages.text: 「言語とは意味のお仕着せであり、そのお仕着せは話者の精神の構造を直接に映し出します。あなたの言語を理解することで、私はあなたの思考をも理解し、あなたという概念を理解することへ、また一歩近づくのです」
languages.original_text: "Language is the livery of meaning, and this livery directly reflects the architecture of the speaker's mind. By comprehending your language, I also comprehend your thinking, bringing me one iota closer to comprehending you as a concept."

traits.locale_text: 「言語とは意味のお仕着せであり、そのお仕着せは話者の精神の構造を直接に映し出します。あなたの言語を理解することで、私はあなたの思考をも理解し、あなたという概念を理解することへ、また一歩近づくのです」

languages.text: “语言是意义的盛装，而这盛装直接反映着说话者心智的架构。通过理解你的语言，我也理解了你的思维，这让我距离将你作为一种概念理解，又近了一分。”
languages.original_text: "Language is the livery of meaning, and this livery directly reflects the architecture of the speaker's mind. By comprehending your language, I also comprehend your thinking, bringing me one iota closer to comprehending you as a concept."

traits.locale_text: “语言是意义的盛装，而这盛装直接反映着说话者心智的架构。通过理解你的语言，我也理解了你的思维，这让我距离将你作为一种概念理解，又近了一分。”

languages.text: "Sprache ist das Gewand der Bedeutung, und dieses Gewand spiegelt direkt die Architektur des Verstandes des Sprechers wider. Wenn ich Eure Sprache verstehe, verstehe ich auch Euer Denken, was mir wiederum hilft, Euch als Konzept zu verstehen."
languages.original_text: "Language is the livery of meaning, and this livery directly reflects the architecture of the speaker's mind. By comprehending your language, I also comprehend your thinking, bringing me one iota closer to comprehending you as a concept."

traits.locale_text: "Sprache ist das Gewand der Bedeutung, und dieses Gewand spiegelt direkt die Architektur des Verstandes des Sprechers wider. Wenn ich Eure Sprache verstehe, verstehe ich auch Euer Denken, was mir wiederum hilft, Euch als Konzept zu verstehen."

languages.text: « Le langage est la forme que revêt le sens, et cette forme reflète directement l'architecture de l'esprit du locuteur. En apprenant votre langue, je comprends votre façon de penser, ce qui me permet de mieux vous appréhender en tant que concept. »
languages.original_text: "Language is the livery of meaning, and this livery directly reflects the architecture of the speaker's mind. By comprehending your language, I also comprehend your thinking, bringing me one iota closer to comprehending you as a concept."

languages.text: "Dil, anlamın giysisidir. Bu giysi, konuşmacının zihninin mimarisini doğrudan yansıtır. Dilinizi kavrayarak düşünce tarzınızı da kavrıyorum ve bu beni sizi bir kavram olarak kavramaya bir nebze daha yaklaştırıyor."
